title: Baia Mare, Maramureș — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Baia Mare, Maramureș: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Baia Mare is a city in Maramureș with a population of 123,738. The gateway to the Maramureș region, known for its traditional wooden churches, mining heritage, and proximity to some of Romania’s most authentic rural landscapes.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
